title: DistributedScience

abstract: The scientific process plays out in a multi-scale system comprising subsystems, each with their own dynamics. We formalize the scientific process as multi-scale Active Inference, where individual researchers, laboratories, institutions, and the global scientific community each minimize free energy at their respective scales. This framework accounts for hypothesis generation, experimental design, peer review, and knowledge accumulation as nested inference processes. We discuss how this multi-scal
